ð¯ðµ áá»áááºáá­á¯ááºáá¶á¡áá½ááº á¡áá°á¸á¡áá½áá·áºá¡áááºá¸: á¡áá°á¸ááá¼áá·áº áá»áááºáá­á¯ááºáá¶ IT áá¯ááºáááºá¸áá½ááºáá­á¯á· Work Visa áá¼áá·áºáá­á¯ááºáá­á¯ááºáááºáá±á¬ááºáá­á¯ááºáá²á· á¡áá½áá·áºá¡áááºá¸áá»á¬á¸áá­á¯ áá±á¸áá½ááºá¸áá­á¯ááºáá²á· ITPEC (IT Professionals Examination Council) áááºáá¾ááºáá­á¯ áá¼ááºáá¬áá­á¯ááºáá¶áá¾á¬áááº ááááºááá» áááºáá°áá¼ááºáááºáá­á¯ááºáá«áá¼á®á

All in One Programming Course Outline
=======================
Module-1: C++
- Introduction and Basic
            â¢ Programming fundamentals (variables, data types, operators)
â¢ Input/output with cin/cout
â¢ First console programs

- Control Flow
             â¢ Conditions (if, else, switch)
â¢ Loops (for, while, do-while)
â¢ Mini problem-solving exercises

- Functions
            â¢ Defining and calling functions
â¢ Parameters & return values
â¢ Scope of variables

- Arrays & Strings
             â¢ 1D & 2D arrays
â¢ C-strings & string functions
â¢ Small problems (reverse string, matrix sum)

- Pointer & References
              â¢ Basics of pointers
â¢ Dynamic memory (new, delete)
â¢ Pointer arithmetic
â¢ Passing by reference

- Structures & OOP Basics
               â¢ Structures
â¢ Classes & objects
â¢ Constructors, destructors

- Advanced OOP
               â¢ Inheritance & polymorphism
â¢ Encapsulation
â¢ Operator overloading

- Mini Project (Console App)
               â¢ Example: Student Management System / Simple ATM
â¢ Covers arrays, functions, classes, file I/O

Module-2 : Python
- Python Basic
       â¢ Syntax, variables, data types
â¢ Input/output
â¢ Control flow
- Functions & Data Structures
        â¢ Lists, tuples, sets, dictionaries
â¢ Functions & lambda
â¢ String manipulation

- Modules, File Handling & OOP
          â¢ Import modules & packages
â¢ File read/write
â¢ Classes & objects

- Mini Project
            â¢ Example: To-Do List App or Simple Calculator with File Save

Module-3 : MySQL Database
- Intro to Databases & SQL Basics
                    â¢ What is a DBMS?
â¢ Creating databases & tables
â¢ Basic queries (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)

- Keys & Constraints
                     â¢ Primary key, foreign key
â¢ Constraints (NOT NULL, UNIQUE)
â¢ Joins (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT)

- Advanced SQL
                      â¢ Aggregate functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG)
â¢ Subqueries
â¢ Views & Indexes

- Final Project (Database)
                        â¢ Example: Inventory/Shop Management Database

Module-4 : Java 
- Java Basic
            â¢ Syntax, variables, data types
â¢ Input/output with Scanner
â¢ Control flow

- Functions & OOP Basics
            â¢ Methods
â¢ Classes & objects
â¢ Constructors

- Advanced OOP
            â¢ Inheritance, interfaces
â¢ Encapsulation & polymorphism

- Mini Project
             â¢ Example: Library Management System (console)

Module-5 : C#
- Basics of C#
              â¢ Syntax, variables, data types
â¢ Input/output with Console.ReadLine()
â¢ Control flow

- Functions & Arrays
                 â¢ Methods, parameters
â¢ Arrays, strings
â¢ Exception handling

- OOP in C#
                  â¢ Classes, objects
â¢ Properties, constructors, destructors
â¢ Inheritance & polymorphism

- Mini Project
                  â¢ Example: Console-based Contact Management

All in One Programming Course   (On Campus + Online Zoom Face to Face)

ð OSI Model (Open Systems Interconnection Reference Model) áá­á¯áááºáá¾á¬ Computer Networking áá¾áá·áº Data Communication Systems áá»á¬á¸áá­á¯ Design, Implementation, Testing áá¾áá·áº Troubleshooting áá¼á¯áá¯ááºáá¬áá½ááº á¡áá¯á¶á¸áá¼á¯áá±á¬ Conceptual Reference Model áááºáá¯áá¼ááºáááºá OSI Model áá­á¯ OSI 7-Layer Model áá¯áááºá¸ áá±á«áºáá­á¯áá¼áá¼á®á¸ Network Communication Process áá­á¯ Layered Architecture á¡áá±áá²á· ááááºááá» áá½á²áá¼á¬á¸áá±á¬áºáá¼áá¬á¸áá«áááºá

ð OSI Model  áá­á¯ ISO (International Organization for Standardization) áá¾ Developed áá¯ááºáá²á·áá¼á®á¸ á¡áá­ááááºáá½ááºáá»ááºáá¾á¬ Different Vendors áá»á¬á¸áá¾ áá¯ááºáá¯ááºáá¬á¸áá±á¬ Hardware, Software áá¾áá·áº Network Protocols áá»á¬á¸á¡áá¼á¬á¸ Interoperability áá­á¯  Communication áá¯ááºáá±á¸áá­á¯ááºáááº áá¼ááºáá«áááºá

ð OSI Model áááº Network Communication áá­á¯ 7 Layers á¡áá¼ááº áá½á²áá¼á¬á¸áá¬á¸áá¼á®á¸ Layer áááºáá¯áá®áá½ááº áá®á¸ááá·áºáá¬áááºáá»á¬á¸ (Specific Functions) áá¾á­áá«áááºá áá­á¯áá­á¯á· Layer á¡áá­á¯ááº áá½á²áá¼á¬á¸áá¬á¸áá¼ááºá¸áá¼á±á¬áá·áº Network Design, Protocol Development áá¾áá·áº Network Troubleshooting áá¯ááºáááºá¸áá»á¬á¸áá­á¯ áá­á¯áá­á¯ áá½ááºáá°áá±áá«áááºá Network Issue áááºáá¯ áá¼ááºáá±á«áºáá¬áá±á¬á¡áá« "Which Layer is causing the problem" áá­á¯ áááºáá¾ááºáá­á¯ááºáá¼ááºá¸áá¾á¬ OSI Model á á¡áá­áá¡á¬á¸áá¬áá»ááºáááºáááº áá¼ááºáá¼á®á¸ Network Engineer áá»á¬á¸á Security Engineer áá»á¬á¸á¡áá½ááº Troubleshooting áá¯ááºáá¬áá¾á¬ áá­á¯áá­á¯áá½ááºáá° á¡áá±á¬ááºá¡áá°áá¼ááºáá±áá«áááºá

ð Software Developers áá»á¬á¸ áá¾áá·áº Hardware Manufacturers áá»á¬á¸á OSI Model áá­á¯ Standard Reference á¡áá¼ááº á¡áá¯á¶á¸áá¼á¯á áááºá¸áá­á¯á·á Products áá»á¬á¸áá­á¯ áá®áá­á¯ááºá¸áá±á¸áá½á²áá¼áá«áááºá OSI Model Standards áá­á¯ áá­á¯ááºáá¬áá¬á¸áá±á¬ Systems áá»á¬á¸áááº Vendor-independent áá¼ááºááá¼áá·áº áá¯ááºáá¯ááºáá²á· Vendor ááá°áá¼áá±á¬áºáááºá¸ Seamless Communication áá¼á¯áá¯ááºáá­á¯ááºáá«áááºá áááºá¸áá¼á±á¬áá·áº OSI Model áááº  Network Technologies áááºáá¯áá¯á¶á¸á¡áá½ááº á¡áá±á¸áá«áá±á¬ Foundation Model áááºáá¯áá¼ááºáá«áááºá
